name: CALL-E API createAndWait - IVR quality sample

parameters.content:
## CALL-E API IVR quality sample
Manual trigger sample with two public Brazil IVR/contact-center rows. Each row has `phone`, `task`, and `metadata`. `Loop Over Calls` runs with batch size 1, so CALL-E createAndWait is executed one phone at a time before the loop advances to the next row.

## Configure before running
1. Fill `apiKey` in CALL-E Config. The workflow fails fast if it is missing.
2. The default rows use public Brazil IVR/contact-center numbers from official pages and may trigger real calls. Replace them with owned or authorized test numbers for live runs.
3. Edit each IVR QA task and metadata as needed.

No Form Trigger, Notion node, npm SDK, Execute Command, or external dependency is used. The visible loop node controls one-by-one dialing.
